built with pdoc

deepxube.updaters.updater_q_rl 

  1from abc import ABC
  2from typing import List, Tuple, cast, Type
  3
  4import numpy as np
  5from numpy.typing import NDArray
  6
  7from deepxube.base.domain import Domain, GoalSampleableFromState, Action, State, Goal
  8from deepxube.base.pathfinding import FNsHQ, FNsHeurQ, FNsHeurQPolicy, PathFindSetHeurQ, EdgeQ, InstanceEdge, Node
  9from deepxube.base.updater import UpdateHER, UpdateHasPolicy, UpdateHeurQ, UpdateRL, D, UpArgs
 10from deepxube.factories.updater_factory import updater_factory
 11from deepxube.updaters.utils.replay_buffer_utils import ReplayBufferQ
 12from deepxube.utils.timing_utils import Times
 13
 14import time
 15
 16
 17def _pathfind_q_step(pathfind: PathFindSetHeurQ) -> List[EdgeQ]:
 18    edges_popped: List[EdgeQ] = pathfind.step()[1]
 19    assert len(edges_popped) == len(pathfind.instances), f"Values were {len(edges_popped)} and {len(pathfind.instances)}"
 20
 21    return edges_popped
 22
 23
 24def _get_edge_popped_data(edges_popped: List[EdgeQ],
 25                          times: Times) -> Tuple[List[State], List[Goal], List[bool], List[Action], List[float], List[State]]:
 26
 27    start_time = time.time()
 28    nodes: List[Node] = [edge.node for edge in edges_popped]
 29    states: List[State] = [node.state for node in nodes]
 30    goals: List[Goal] = [node.goal for node in nodes]
 31    actions: List[Action] = [edge.action for edge in edges_popped]
 32
 33    is_solved_l: List[bool] = []
 34    tcs: List[float] = []
 35    states_next: List[State] = []
 36    for edge, node in zip(edges_popped, nodes, strict=True):
 37        assert node.is_solved is not None
 38        is_solved_l.append(node.is_solved)
 39        tc, node_next = node.edge_dict[edge.action]
 40        tcs.append(tc)
 41        states_next.append(node_next.state)
 42    times.record_time("edge_data", time.time() - start_time)
 43
 44    return states, goals, is_solved_l, actions, tcs, states_next
 45
 46
 47class UpdateHeurQRL(UpdateHeurQ[D, FNsHQ, PathFindSetHeurQ], UpdateRL[D, FNsHQ, PathFindSetHeurQ, InstanceEdge], ABC):
 48    @staticmethod
 49    def pathfind_type() -> Type[PathFindSetHeurQ]:
 50        return PathFindSetHeurQ
 51
 52    def __init__(self, domain: D, pathfind_arg: str, up_args: UpArgs):
 53        super().__init__(domain, pathfind_arg, up_args)
 54        self.rb: ReplayBufferQ = ReplayBufferQ(0)
 55
 56    def _step(self, pathfind: PathFindSetHeurQ, times: Times) -> None:
 57        _pathfind_q_step(pathfind)
 58
 59    def _q_learning_target(self, goals: List[Goal], is_solved_l: List[bool], tcs: List[float], states_next: List[State]) -> List[float]:
 60        # min cost-to-go for next state
 61        actions_next: List[List[Action]] = self.get_pathfind().get_state_actions(states_next, goals)
 62        qvals_next_l: List[List[float]] = self._get_targ_heur_fn()(states_next, goals, actions_next)
 63        qvals_next_min: List[float] = [min(qvals_next) for qvals_next in qvals_next_l]
 64
 65        # backup cost-to-go
 66        ctg_backups: NDArray = np.array(tcs) + np.array(qvals_next_min)
 67        ctg_backups = ctg_backups * np.logical_not(np.array(is_solved_l))
 68
 69        return cast(List[float], ctg_backups.tolist())
 70
 71    def _inputs_ctgs_to_np(self, states: List[State], goals: List[Goal], actions: List[Action], ctgs_backup: List[float], times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
 72        start_time = time.time()
 73        inputs_np: List[NDArray] = self.get_heur_nnet_par().to_np(states, goals, [[action] for action in actions])
 74        times.record_time("to_np", time.time() - start_time)
 75
 76        return inputs_np + [np.array(ctgs_backup)]
 77
 78    def _init_replay_buffer(self, max_size: int) -> None:
 79        self.rb = ReplayBufferQ(max_size)
 80
 81    def _rb_add(self, states: List[State], goals: List[Goal], is_solved_l: List[bool], actions: List[Action], tcs: List[float], states_next: List[State],
 82                times: Times) -> None:
 83        start_time = time.time()
 84        self.rb.add(list(zip(states, goals, is_solved_l, actions, tcs, states_next, strict=True)))
 85        times.record_time("add", time.time() - start_time, path=["replay"])
 86
 87    def _sample_rb_qlearn_target(self, num: int, times: Times) -> Tuple[List[State], List[Goal], List[Action], List[float]]:
 88        # sample from replay buffer
 89        start_time = time.time()
 90        states, goals, is_solved_l, actions, tcs, states_next = self.rb.sample(num)
 91        times.record_time("samp", time.time() - start_time, path=["replay"])
 92
 93        # value iteration update
 94        start_time = time.time()
 95        ctgs_backup: List[float] = self._q_learning_target(goals, is_solved_l, tcs, states_next)
 96        times.record_time("qlearn_targ", time.time() - start_time, path=["replay"])
 97
 98        return states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup
 99
100
101class UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoalABC(UpdateHeurQRL[Domain, FNsHQ], ABC):
102    @staticmethod
103    def domain_type() -> Type[Domain]:
104        return Domain
105
106    def _step_sync_main(self, pathfind: PathFindSetHeurQ, times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
107        # take a step
108        edges_popped: List[EdgeQ] = _pathfind_q_step(pathfind)
109
110        # get sync states/goals/is_solved
111        states_sync, goals_sync, is_solved_l_sync, actions_sync, tcs_sync, states_next_sync = _get_edge_popped_data(edges_popped, times)
112
113        # add to replay buffer
114        self._rb_add(states_sync, goals_sync, is_solved_l_sync, actions_sync, tcs_sync, states_next_sync, times)
115
116        # rb q-learning update
117        states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup = self._sample_rb_qlearn_target(len(edges_popped), times)
118
119        return self._inputs_ctgs_to_np(states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup, times)
120
121    def _get_instance_data_norb(self, instances: List[InstanceEdge], times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
122        # get popped edge data
123        edges_popped: List[EdgeQ] = []
124        for instance in instances:
125            edges_popped.extend(instance.get_edges_popped())
126
127        # backup
128        start_time = time.time()
129        if self.up_args.backup == 1:
130            if self.up_args.ub_heur_solns:
131                for edge in edges_popped:
132                    assert edge.node.is_solved is not None
133                    if edge.node.is_solved:
134                        edge.node.upper_bound_parent_path(0.0)
135        elif self.up_args.backup == -1:
136            for instance in instances:
137                instance.root_node.tree_backup()
138        else:
139            raise ValueError(f"Unknown backup {self.up_args.backup}")
140        times.record_time("backup", time.time() - start_time)
141
142        start_time = time.time()
143        nodes: List[Node] = [edge.node for edge in edges_popped]
144        states: List[State] = [node.state for node in nodes]
145        goals: List[Goal] = [node.goal for node in nodes]
146        actions: List[Action] = [edge.action for edge in edges_popped]
147
148        ctgs_backup: List[float] = []
149        for edge, node in zip(edges_popped, nodes):
150            ctg_backup = node.backup_act(edge.action)
151            node.backup_val = ctg_backup
152            ctgs_backup.append(ctg_backup)
153
154        times.record_time("get_tr_data", time.time() - start_time)
155
156        # to_np
157        return self._inputs_ctgs_to_np(states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup, times)
158
159    def _get_instance_data_rb(self, instances: List[InstanceEdge], times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
160        # get popped edge data
161        edges_popped: List[EdgeQ] = []
162        for instance in instances:
163            edges_popped.extend(instance.get_edges_popped())
164        states_p, goals_p, is_solved_l_p, actions_p, tcs_p, states_next_p = _get_edge_popped_data(edges_popped, times)
165
166        # add to replay buffer
167        self._rb_add(states_p, goals_p, is_solved_l_p, actions_p, tcs_p, states_next_p, times)
168
169        # rb q-learning update
170        states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup = self._sample_rb_qlearn_target(len(edges_popped), times)
171
172        return self._inputs_ctgs_to_np(states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup, times)
173
174
175class UpdateHeurQRLHERABC(UpdateHeurQRL[GoalSampleableFromState, FNsHQ], UpdateHER[FNsHQ, PathFindSetHeurQ, InstanceEdge], ABC):
176    @staticmethod
177    def domain_type() -> Type[GoalSampleableFromState]:
178        return GoalSampleableFromState
179
180    def _get_instance_data_rb(self, instances: List[InstanceEdge], times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
181        # get goals according to HER
182        instances, goals_inst_her = self._get_her_goals(instances, times)
183
184        # get states and goals
185        start_time = time.time()
186        states_her: List[State] = []
187        goals_her: List[Goal] = []
188        actions_her: List[Action] = []
189        tcs_her: List[float] = []
190        states_next_her: List[State] = []
191        for instance, goal_her in zip(instances, goals_inst_her, strict=True):
192            nodes: List[Node] = [edge.node for edge in instance.get_edges_popped()]
193            states_inst: List[State] = [node.state for node in nodes]
194            states_her.extend(states_inst)
195            goals_her.extend([goal_her] * len(states_inst))
196            actions_her.extend([edge.action for edge in instance.get_edges_popped()])
197
198            for edge, node in zip(instance.get_edges_popped(), nodes, strict=True):
199                tc, node_next = node.edge_dict[edge.action]
200                tcs_her.append(tc)
201                states_next_her.append(node_next.state)
202
203        times.record_time("data", time.time() - start_time, path=["HER"])
204
205        # is solved
206        start_time = time.time()
207        is_solved_l_her: List[bool] = self.domain.is_solved(states_her, goals_her)
208        times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time, path=["HER"])
209
210        # add to replay buffer
211        self._rb_add(states_her, goals_her, is_solved_l_her, actions_her, tcs_her, states_next_her, times)
212
213        # rb q-learning update
214        states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup = self._sample_rb_qlearn_target(len(states_her), times)
215
216        # to_np
217        return self._inputs_ctgs_to_np(states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup, times)
218
219
220@updater_factory.register_class("update_q_rl")
221class UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoal(UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoalABC[FNsHeurQ]):
222    @staticmethod
223    def functions_type() -> Type[FNsHeurQ]:
224        return FNsHeurQ
225
226    def _get_pathfind_functions(self) -> FNsHeurQ:
227        return FNsHeurQ(self.get_heur_fn())
228
229
230@updater_factory.register_class("update_q_rl_her")
231class UpdateHeurQRLHER(UpdateHeurQRLHERABC[FNsHeurQ]):
232    @staticmethod
233    def functions_type() -> Type[FNsHeurQ]:
234        return FNsHeurQ
235
236    def _get_pathfind_functions(self) -> FNsHeurQ:
237        return FNsHeurQ(self.get_heur_fn())
238
239
240@updater_factory.register_class("update_q_p_rl")
241class UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoalPolicy(UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoalABC[FNsHeurQPolicy], UpdateHasPolicy[Domain, FNsHeurQPolicy, PathFindSetHeurQ, InstanceEdge]):
242    @staticmethod
243    def functions_type() -> Type[FNsHeurQPolicy]:
244        return FNsHeurQPolicy
245
246    def _get_pathfind_functions(self) -> FNsHeurQPolicy:
247        return FNsHeurQPolicy(self.get_heur_fn(), self.get_policy_fn())
248
249
250@updater_factory.register_class("update_q_p_rl_her")
251class UpdateHeurQRLHERPolicy(UpdateHeurQRLHERABC[FNsHeurQPolicy], UpdateHasPolicy[Domain, FNsHeurQPolicy, PathFindSetHeurQ, InstanceEdge]):
252    @staticmethod
253    def functions_type() -> Type[FNsHeurQPolicy]:
254        return FNsHeurQPolicy
255
256    def _get_pathfind_functions(self) -> FNsHeurQPolicy:
257        return FNsHeurQPolicy(self.get_heur_fn(), self.get_policy_fn())
class UpdateHeurQRL(deepxube.base.updater.UpdateHeurQ[~D, ~FNsHQ, deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindSetHeurQ], deepxube.base.updater.UpdateRL[~D, ~FNsHQ, deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindSetHeurQ, deepxube.base.pathfinding.InstanceEdge], abc.ABC): 
48class UpdateHeurQRL(UpdateHeurQ[D, FNsHQ, PathFindSetHeurQ], UpdateRL[D, FNsHQ, PathFindSetHeurQ, InstanceEdge], ABC):
49    @staticmethod
50    def pathfind_type() -> Type[PathFindSetHeurQ]:
51        return PathFindSetHeurQ
52
53    def __init__(self, domain: D, pathfind_arg: str, up_args: UpArgs):
54        super().__init__(domain, pathfind_arg, up_args)
55        self.rb: ReplayBufferQ = ReplayBufferQ(0)
56
57    def _step(self, pathfind: PathFindSetHeurQ, times: Times) -> None:
58        _pathfind_q_step(pathfind)
59
60    def _q_learning_target(self, goals: List[Goal], is_solved_l: List[bool], tcs: List[float], states_next: List[State]) -> List[float]:
61        # min cost-to-go for next state
62        actions_next: List[List[Action]] = self.get_pathfind().get_state_actions(states_next, goals)
63        qvals_next_l: List[List[float]] = self._get_targ_heur_fn()(states_next, goals, actions_next)
64        qvals_next_min: List[float] = [min(qvals_next) for qvals_next in qvals_next_l]
65
66        # backup cost-to-go
67        ctg_backups: NDArray = np.array(tcs) + np.array(qvals_next_min)
68        ctg_backups = ctg_backups * np.logical_not(np.array(is_solved_l))
69
70        return cast(List[float], ctg_backups.tolist())
71
72    def _inputs_ctgs_to_np(self, states: List[State], goals: List[Goal], actions: List[Action], ctgs_backup: List[float], times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
73        start_time = time.time()
74        inputs_np: List[NDArray] = self.get_heur_nnet_par().to_np(states, goals, [[action] for action in actions])
75        times.record_time("to_np", time.time() - start_time)
76
77        return inputs_np + [np.array(ctgs_backup)]
78
79    def _init_replay_buffer(self, max_size: int) -> None:
80        self.rb = ReplayBufferQ(max_size)
81
82    def _rb_add(self, states: List[State], goals: List[Goal], is_solved_l: List[bool], actions: List[Action], tcs: List[float], states_next: List[State],
83                times: Times) -> None:
84        start_time = time.time()
85        self.rb.add(list(zip(states, goals, is_solved_l, actions, tcs, states_next, strict=True)))
86        times.record_time("add", time.time() - start_time, path=["replay"])
87
88    def _sample_rb_qlearn_target(self, num: int, times: Times) -> Tuple[List[State], List[Goal], List[Action], List[float]]:
89        # sample from replay buffer
90        start_time = time.time()
91        states, goals, is_solved_l, actions, tcs, states_next = self.rb.sample(num)
92        times.record_time("samp", time.time() - start_time, path=["replay"])
93
94        # value iteration update
95        start_time = time.time()
96        ctgs_backup: List[float] = self._q_learning_target(goals, is_solved_l, tcs, states_next)
97        times.record_time("qlearn_targ", time.time() - start_time, path=["replay"])
98
99        return states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup

Abstract base class for generic types.

A generic type is typically declared by inheriting from this class parameterized with one or more type variables. For example, a generic mapping type might be defined as::

class Mapping(Generic[KT, VT]): def __getitem__(self, key: KT) -> VT: ... # Etc.

This class can then be used as follows::

def lookup_name(mapping: Mapping[KT, VT], key: KT, default: VT) -> VT: try: return mapping[key] except KeyError: return default

@staticmethod
def pathfind_type() -> Type[deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindSetHeurQ]: 
49    @staticmethod
50    def pathfind_type() -> Type[PathFindSetHeurQ]:
51        return PathFindSetHeurQ
rb: deepxube.updaters.utils.replay_buffer_utils.ReplayBufferQ

class UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoalABC(deepxube.updaters.updater_q_rl.UpdateHeurQRL[deepxube.base.domain.Domain, ~FNsHQ], abc.ABC): 
102class UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoalABC(UpdateHeurQRL[Domain, FNsHQ], ABC):
103    @staticmethod
104    def domain_type() -> Type[Domain]:
105        return Domain
106
107    def _step_sync_main(self, pathfind: PathFindSetHeurQ, times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
108        # take a step
109        edges_popped: List[EdgeQ] = _pathfind_q_step(pathfind)
110
111        # get sync states/goals/is_solved
112        states_sync, goals_sync, is_solved_l_sync, actions_sync, tcs_sync, states_next_sync = _get_edge_popped_data(edges_popped, times)
113
114        # add to replay buffer
115        self._rb_add(states_sync, goals_sync, is_solved_l_sync, actions_sync, tcs_sync, states_next_sync, times)
116
117        # rb q-learning update
118        states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup = self._sample_rb_qlearn_target(len(edges_popped), times)
119
120        return self._inputs_ctgs_to_np(states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup, times)
121
122    def _get_instance_data_norb(self, instances: List[InstanceEdge], times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
123        # get popped edge data
124        edges_popped: List[EdgeQ] = []
125        for instance in instances:
126            edges_popped.extend(instance.get_edges_popped())
127
128        # backup
129        start_time = time.time()
130        if self.up_args.backup == 1:
131            if self.up_args.ub_heur_solns:
132                for edge in edges_popped:
133                    assert edge.node.is_solved is not None
134                    if edge.node.is_solved:
135                        edge.node.upper_bound_parent_path(0.0)
136        elif self.up_args.backup == -1:
137            for instance in instances:
138                instance.root_node.tree_backup()
139        else:
140            raise ValueError(f"Unknown backup {self.up_args.backup}")
141        times.record_time("backup", time.time() - start_time)
142
143        start_time = time.time()
144        nodes: List[Node] = [edge.node for edge in edges_popped]
145        states: List[State] = [node.state for node in nodes]
146        goals: List[Goal] = [node.goal for node in nodes]
147        actions: List[Action] = [edge.action for edge in edges_popped]
148
149        ctgs_backup: List[float] = []
150        for edge, node in zip(edges_popped, nodes):
151            ctg_backup = node.backup_act(edge.action)
152            node.backup_val = ctg_backup
153            ctgs_backup.append(ctg_backup)
154
155        times.record_time("get_tr_data", time.time() - start_time)
156
157        # to_np
158        return self._inputs_ctgs_to_np(states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup, times)
159
160    def _get_instance_data_rb(self, instances: List[InstanceEdge], times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
161        # get popped edge data
162        edges_popped: List[EdgeQ] = []
163        for instance in instances:
164            edges_popped.extend(instance.get_edges_popped())
165        states_p, goals_p, is_solved_l_p, actions_p, tcs_p, states_next_p = _get_edge_popped_data(edges_popped, times)
166
167        # add to replay buffer
168        self._rb_add(states_p, goals_p, is_solved_l_p, actions_p, tcs_p, states_next_p, times)
169
170        # rb q-learning update
171        states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup = self._sample_rb_qlearn_target(len(edges_popped), times)
172
173        return self._inputs_ctgs_to_np(states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup, times)

Abstract base class for generic types.

A generic type is typically declared by inheriting from this class parameterized with one or more type variables. For example, a generic mapping type might be defined as::

class Mapping(Generic[KT, VT]): def __getitem__(self, key: KT) -> VT: ... # Etc.

This class can then be used as follows::

def lookup_name(mapping: Mapping[KT, VT], key: KT, default: VT) -> VT: try: return mapping[key] except KeyError: return default

@staticmethod
def domain_type() -> Type[deepxube.base.domain.Domain]: 
103    @staticmethod
104    def domain_type() -> Type[Domain]:
105        return Domain

set_targ_update_num
update_runner
class UpdateHeurQRLHERABC(deepxube.updaters.updater_q_rl.UpdateHeurQRL[deepxube.base.domain.GoalSampleableFromState, ~FNsHQ], deepxube.base.updater.UpdateHER[~FNsHQ, deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindSetHeurQ, deepxube.base.pathfinding.InstanceEdge], abc.ABC): 
176class UpdateHeurQRLHERABC(UpdateHeurQRL[GoalSampleableFromState, FNsHQ], UpdateHER[FNsHQ, PathFindSetHeurQ, InstanceEdge], ABC):
177    @staticmethod
178    def domain_type() -> Type[GoalSampleableFromState]:
179        return GoalSampleableFromState
180
181    def _get_instance_data_rb(self, instances: List[InstanceEdge], times: Times) -> List[NDArray]:
182        # get goals according to HER
183        instances, goals_inst_her = self._get_her_goals(instances, times)
184
185        # get states and goals
186        start_time = time.time()
187        states_her: List[State] = []
188        goals_her: List[Goal] = []
189        actions_her: List[Action] = []
190        tcs_her: List[float] = []
191        states_next_her: List[State] = []
192        for instance, goal_her in zip(instances, goals_inst_her, strict=True):
193            nodes: List[Node] = [edge.node for edge in instance.get_edges_popped()]
194            states_inst: List[State] = [node.state for node in nodes]
195            states_her.extend(states_inst)
196            goals_her.extend([goal_her] * len(states_inst))
197            actions_her.extend([edge.action for edge in instance.get_edges_popped()])
198
199            for edge, node in zip(instance.get_edges_popped(), nodes, strict=True):
200                tc, node_next = node.edge_dict[edge.action]
201                tcs_her.append(tc)
202                states_next_her.append(node_next.state)
203
204        times.record_time("data", time.time() - start_time, path=["HER"])
205
206        # is solved
207        start_time = time.time()
208        is_solved_l_her: List[bool] = self.domain.is_solved(states_her, goals_her)
209        times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time, path=["HER"])
210
211        # add to replay buffer
212        self._rb_add(states_her, goals_her, is_solved_l_her, actions_her, tcs_her, states_next_her, times)
213
214        # rb q-learning update
215        states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup = self._sample_rb_qlearn_target(len(states_her), times)
216
217        # to_np
218        return self._inputs_ctgs_to_np(states, goals, actions, ctgs_backup, times)

Abstract base class for generic types.

A generic type is typically declared by inheriting from this class parameterized with one or more type variables. For example, a generic mapping type might be defined as::

class Mapping(Generic[KT, VT]): def __getitem__(self, key: KT) -> VT: ... # Etc.

This class can then be used as follows::

def lookup_name(mapping: Mapping[KT, VT], key: KT, default: VT) -> VT: try: return mapping[key] except KeyError: return default

@staticmethod
def domain_type() -> Type[deepxube.base.domain.GoalSampleableFromState]: 
177    @staticmethod
178    def domain_type() -> Type[GoalSampleableFromState]:
179        return GoalSampleableFromState

class UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoal(deepxube.updaters.updater_q_rl.UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoalABC[deepxube.base.pathfinding.FNsHeurQ]): 
221@updater_factory.register_class("update_q_rl")
222class UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoal(UpdateHeurQRLKeepGoalABC[FNsHeurQ]):
223    @staticmethod
224    def functions_type() -> Type[FNsHeurQ]:
225        return FNsHeurQ
226
227    def _get_pathfind_functions(self) -> FNsHeurQ:
228        return FNsHeurQ(self.get_heur_fn())
